voice_prosody_quality_notes: Pretty consistently delivers at the same pace without any fluctuation. The user call cutting in and out was did help. "Hello are you still there" sounds very robotic and scripted.

turn_taking_naturalness_notes: Lots of interruptions without any self correcting.
interruption_behavior_notes: User never pauses or changes any delivery even as agent continuously interrupts. User also interrupts and does not hesitate or otherwise as if they would want to get all the information rather than just run a script.
free_text_comments: Still lacks awareness, but otherwise fairly close. Coughing and asking agent to wait was a good touch. User sometimes does not wait for information back from the agent.

interruption_behavior_notes: Interruptions are mechanical. Not all, but several.
behavioral_plausibility_notes: Does sometimes respond based off agent, but not consistantly.
free_text_comments: Agent changed mid conversation.
